requirement_topic.en: ISED ICES-001 EMC — Motor-Operated and Digitally Controlled Power Tools
requirement_topic.zh: ISED ICES-001 电磁兼容 — 电机驱动及数字控制电动工具
requirement_topic.zht: ISED ICES-001 電磁相容 — 馬達驅動及數位控制電動工具

summary.en: Motor-operated power tools, including units with electronic speed control, digitally controlled drives, switched-mode supplies, chargers, displays, or other control electronics, should be assessed first under ISED ICES-001 as the primary EMC emissions standard aligned with CISPR 11. ICES-003 is intended for general information technology equipment and digital apparatus, so it should not be used as the primary EMC standard for motor-operated or digitally controlled power tools unless a separate digital apparatus accessory falls within that scope. ICES compliance is separate from electrical safety certification and separate from RSS radio certification for intentional transmitters.
summary.zh: 电机驱动电动工具，包括带电子调速、数字控制驱动、开关电源、充电器、显示屏或其他控制电子电路的产品，应首先按 ISED ICES-001 评估；该标准是与 CISPR 11 对齐的主要 EMC 发射标准。ICES-003 面向一般信息技术设备和数字装置，因此不应作为电机驱动或数字控制电动工具的主要 EMC 标准，除非某个独立数字装置附件另行落入该范围。ICES 合规独立于电气安全认证，也独立于有意发射器的 RSS 无线电认证。
summary.zht: 馬達驅動電動工具，包括帶電子調速、數位控制驅動、開關電源、充電器、顯示器或其他控制電子電路的產品，應首先按 ISED ICES-001 評估；該標準是與 CISPR 11 對齊的主要 EMC 發射標準。ICES-003 面向一般資訊技術設備和數位裝置，因此不應作為馬達驅動或數位控制電動工具的主要 EMC 標準，除非某個獨立數位裝置附件另行落入該範圍。ICES 合規獨立於電氣安全認證，也獨立於有意發射器的 RSS 無線電認證。

standards_or_laws: ISED ICES-001 — Industrial, Scientific and Medical (ISM) Equipment, aligned with CISPR 11
ISED ICES-003 — Information Technology Equipment including Digital Apparatus, only where a separate general digital apparatus scope applies

summary.en: China EMC evidence for motor-operated tools may reference GB 4343.1 / CISPR 14-1 or other GB/T or GB standards depending on the tool, charger, and electronic control scope. Those reports may help test planning, but they are not Canadian ICES-001 compliance declarations unless the Canadian ICES-001 scope, CISPR 11-aligned limits, configuration, and labelling are specifically addressed.
summary.zh: 中国电机驱动工具的 EMC 证据可能依据工具、充电器和电子控制范围引用 GB 4343.1 / CISPR 14-1 或其他 GB/T、GB 标准。这些报告可帮助测试规划，但除非专门覆盖加拿大 ICES-001 范围、与 CISPR 11 对齐的限值、配置和标签，否则不是加拿大 ICES-001 合规声明。
summary.zht: 中國馬達驅動工具的 EMC 證據可能依據工具、充電器和電子控制範圍引用 GB 4343.1 / CISPR 14-1 或其他 GB/T、GB 標準。這些報告可幫助測試規劃，但除非專門覆蓋加拿大 ICES-001 範圍、與 CISPR 11 對齊的限值、配置和標籤，否則不是加拿大 ICES-001 合規聲明。

standards_or_laws: China CCC EMC requirements where applicable
GB/T EMC standards for motor-operated tools, chargers, or multimedia/digital equipment where applicable

gap.en: Teams often misclassify power tools with digital controls under ICES-003 because they contain digital circuitry. The Canada file should instead justify ICES-001 as the primary motor-operated equipment standard, document the CISPR 11-aligned group/class or residential/commercial use basis where relevant, preserve the Canadian test configuration, and include required ISED statements in the label or manual.
gap.zh: 企业常因电动工具含有数字电路而误按 ICES-003 分类。加拿大文件应改为说明 ICES-001 是电机驱动设备的主要标准，在相关时记录与 CISPR 11 对齐的组别/类别或住宅/商业用途依据，保留加拿大测试配置，并在标签或说明书中加入所需 ISED 声明。
gap.zht: 企業常因電動工具含有數位電路而誤按 ICES-003 分類。加拿大文件應改為說明 ICES-001 是馬達驅動設備的主要標準，在相關時記錄與 CISPR 11 對齊的組別/類別或住宅/商業用途依據，保留加拿大測試配置，並在標籤或說明書中加入所需 ISED 聲明。

target.en: Mandatory where the motor-operated or digitally controlled power tool, charger, or accessory is interference-causing equipment within ISED ICES-001 scope.
target.zh: 当电机驱动或数字控制电动工具、充电器或附件属于 ISED ICES-001 范围内的干扰产生设备时为强制义务。
target.zht: 當馬達驅動或數位控制電動工具、充電器或附件屬於 ISED ICES-001 範圍內的干擾產生設備時為強制義務。

cn.en: Mandatory where covered by Chinese EMC or CCC rules; otherwise product-dependent.
cn.zh: 在中国 EMC 或 CCC 规则覆盖时为强制义务；否则取决于产品类别。
cn.zht: 在中國 EMC 或 CCC 規則覆蓋時為強制義務；否則取決於產品類別。

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not use ICES-003 merely because the power tool includes digital circuitry. For motor-operated or digitally controlled power tools, confirm ICES-001 as the primary EMC standard, then verify whether any separate charger, radio module, or general digital apparatus accessory needs additional review before packaging and manuals are finalized.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】不要仅因电动工具含有数字电路就采用 ICES-003。对于电机驱动或数字控制电动工具，应确认 ICES-001 为主要 EMC 标准，并在包装和说明书定稿前核实任何独立充电器、无线模块或一般数字装置附件是否需要额外审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】不要僅因電動工具含有數位電路就採用 ICES-003。對於馬達驅動或數位控制電動工具，應確認 ICES-001 為主要 EMC 標準，並在包裝和說明書定稿前核實任何獨立充電器、無線模組或一般數位裝置附件是否需要額外審查。
